free_text: Delayed neutron precursors at masses 97-99 and 146-148
BNL TRISTAN Isotope Separator Facility.
Beta and neutron growth and decay curves were
measured by use of pulsed ion beam techniques.
Solar Neutron Counter; efficiency is about 50%.
- Description of
Solar Neutron Counter
92-U-235 target was embedded in a graphite cylinder
within a surface ionization source.
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
Corrected according to last EXFOR rules and Dict.
OS. Subentry 3 split into subs.3-15,
data units changed
OS. Units corr.in subs. 3-15
BNL high-flux beam reactor-thermal neutron beam
Delayed neutron parameters have been estimated for
fast and high energy neutrons.
No information available.
Data taken from Table III of PR/C,28,1740,1983
The recommended delayed neutron probabilities-
(Mann,1982 Antwerp Conf.,p.272.) For Rb and Cs
precursors were used to determine the ratio of
neutron and beta counting efficiencies.
Growth and decay curves were analyzed by least-
squares procedure.
Least-squares analysis was performed to determine the
precursor half-lives from neutron and beta decay
curves.
Total delayed neutron yields were calculated with
the measured delayed neutron probability and the
cumulative yield of the precursor and summing
over all precursors.
Background component was included in the least-squares
analysis.
Extracted from data
Systematic error.
Systematic error is based on uncertainty of reference
Pn value used to normalize for counter efficiencies.
Data taken from Table II of PR/C,28,1740,1983
Subentry split in subs. 3-15; units
changed from PC/FIS to NO-DIM, values divided by 100
Units of MONIT5-ERR corrected

Assumed
Quoted errors for Pn values are based on uncertainties
on saturation activities derived from least-squares
fit to growth-decay curves.

Pn value used to normalize for counter efficiencies.
